nasb.text: having become as much better than the angels, as He has inherited a more excellent name than they.

esv.text: having become as much superior to angels as the name he has inherited is more excellent than theirs.

cnv.text: 他所承受的名比天使的名更尊貴，所以他遠比天使崇高。

ccb.text: 祂既承受了比天使更高的名分，就远超越天使。

csbs.text: 他远比天使更美好，就像他所继承的名比天使的名更尊贵。
